mapper.select:
SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_GROUP_NAME AS groupCodeName, USE_YN AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modDate FROM TB_GROUP_CODE
AND CODE_GROUP_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupCode}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_CODE WHERE TB_CODE.CODE_GROUP_ID = TB_GROUP_CODE.CODE_GROUP_ID AND TB_CODE.CODE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%') )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_DETAIL_CODE WHERE TB_DETAIL_CODE.CODE_GROUP_ID = TB_GROUP_CODE.CODE_GROUP_ID AND TB_DETAIL_CODE.DETAIL_CODE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{detailCode}, '%') )
AND USE_YN = #{useYn}
ORDER BY CODE_GROUP_ID
SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_GROUP_NAME AS groupCodeName, USE_YN AS useYn FROM TB_GROUP_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{groupCode}

SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_ID AS code, CODE_NAME AS codeName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modDate FROM TB_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{groupCode} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, CODE_ID
SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_ID AS code, CODE_NAME AS codeName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn FROM TB_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{param1} AND CODE_ID = #{param2}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CODE ( CODE_GROUP_ID, CODE_ID, CODE_NAME, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{groupCode}, #{code}, #{codeName}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_ID AS code, DETAIL_CODE_ID AS detailCode, DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS detailCodeName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modDate FROM TB_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{param1} AND CODE_ID = #{param2} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, DETAIL_CODE_ID

SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_ID AS code, DETAIL_CODE_ID AS detailCode, DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS detailCodeName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn FROM TB_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{param1} AND CODE_ID = #{param2} AND DETAIL_CODE_ID = #{param3}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DETAIL_CODE ( CODE_GROUP_ID, CODE_ID, DETAIL_CODE_ID, DETAIL_CODE_NAME, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{groupCode}, #{code}, #{detailCode}, #{detailCodeName}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn} )
